answers: Improve singing: practice breathing exercises (diaphragmatic breathing), warm up before singing, and record yourself to hear mistakes.
Vocal exercises: lip trills, scales (do-re-mi), humming, sirens, and vowel exercises. Warm up for 10 minutes before singing.
Tips: stay hydrated, don't strain your voice, sing in your comfortable range, and avoid whispering (stresses vocal cords).
Gan gaowa tips: niyomito practice koro, breathing exercise koro, range e gao, ar nijer recording shuno feedback er jonno.
